releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
Minor changes.
- Fixed: Loading time for SVG icons decreased. The list is now chunked and you can add icons without much loading time.
- Fixed: You can now pan in a second window but only when it is not fullscreen. There is a known Electron bug that prevent this.
- Party Pin: The frontmatter now stores: zoommapPingSourcePath and zoommapPingSourceFileName

New undo feature.
- For the last 3 things you delete you can now use the undo feature. You find it at the bottom of the context menu.
releases.name: Updates

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: To support the new Fog of War feature in TTRPG Tools: Player Screen version 1.1.0, a few small adjustments were required.
releases.name: Fog of War adjustments

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
New Feature: Grid
- You can now enable a Grid in the preferences if you need it
  - Generate either a square or hex grid as an SVG, customize its colors, adjust spacing, and define line width.
    - A live alignment offset feature lets you position the grid exactly where you need it, and the +/- controls allow you to fine‑tune the spacing.
    
A Feature for all, not only for a second screen like Plugin user.
releases.name: Grid Feature Release

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
This release focuses on text layers.

- A text layer can now contain multiple text boxes, reducing clutter in the context menu.
- The text layer context menu has been completely overhauled.
- When adding a text box, you can now choose between custom or auto:
  - Auto: You don’t have to draw the lines yourself; they are generated automatically.
  - Custom: The previous behavior, where you draw your own lines. This can be easier when working with backgrounds that already contain lines, such as character sheets.
- The context menus for rectangle and polyline drawings now include a new function: Add text box → custom/auto
  - This creates a text box inside the rectangle or along the polyline.
releases.name: Text Layer Improved

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: Fixed: Panning maps on mobile with gestures no longer opens Obsidian’s side panels.
releases.name: Panning on Mobile Release

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
I just released a new plugin TTRPG Tools: Player Screen.
To send maps to the player screen you must activate this feature in the preferences in the plugin settings.
releases.name: Player screen integration

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
- The pattern from drawings didn't recalculate when editing the shape. Now when you stop editing it recalculates.
- The hover popover size setting didn't worked at all: fixed.
releases.name: Minor changes

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
You can now edit your drawings, right click on them to see the options.
Dice pin can now scale like sticker or be placed as hud pin.
releases.name: Edit drawings release

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
Improvements:
- You can now move text layers.
- Added an option for text layers so you can choose if you want auto flow between base lines. That is if you have a table of something like skills on a character sheet and you would erase something from one line all text would move but now you can disable it.
- Switch pin added. You can now add a switch pin and choose whether it has to rotate the base images or switch to a specific one.
- Dice pin added. You can now add a dice pin and choose which dice it should roll and if it should render dice graphically.
releases.name: Quality of mapping release

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
This update delivers a range of improvements and long‑requested features:
- Drawing and text layers can now also be bound directly to a base image.
- Fixed a bug that limited you to creating only two marker layers from the Edit View window.
- Swap pins can now be scaled using the Pin sizes for this map window for the current map, it is now also available in the swap‑pin context menu.
- Tooltips can be displayed permanently, with customizable X and Y offsets for precise placement.
- The text‑layer bounding box is now much more visible while drawing.
- Saving a route as a polyline no longer shows inverted length values when measuring from right to left.
- You can now use an SVG as the base for your SVG icons, including support for outlines and custom icon positioning.
- Mobile users no longer accidentally open Obsidian’s side panels while panning the map. I couldn't test this.
releases.name: Various things release

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
- Added the option to set a marker layer for swap pins.
- Added a hotkey to clear measurements.
- Fixed an issue in styles.css where the context menu couldn’t display all items when too many travel presets were present.
- The Use First Base button in the Edit View modal now updates the new marker.json name instantly, making it easier to assign different names when using the map multiple times.
releases.name: Small additions release

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
New feature added:
- Party Pins can now generate a table based on your travel time presets.

Quality of Life improvements:
- You can now choose which of the four features a Party Pin should generate.
- “Draw layers” has been moved to the Draw section in the context menu.
- “Show travel days” and “Max travel time” now appear at the top of the Travel Time Presets list instead of at the bottom.
- Pins on the map no longer block you from setting a waypoint while measuring.
- Text layers boxes are now more visible.
- The “Add SVG icon” button now appears above the SVG icon list.
- Added an option in Preferences to open a pin’s link in a new tab using the middle mouse button.

Cleaning:
- Pin size overrides now clean up the marker.json file after every Edit pin size overrides → Save action.
releases.name: Feature and QOL release

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: Adde 2 lines that export measurement rules from the travel pack to the library.json so that measurement can work in publish.
releases.name: Requirement for Obsidian Publish added

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: This Hotfix allows that you can use multiple values on one property key.
releases.name: Hotfix

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
The party pin has gained additional options:
- You can now choose between Off, Tags, or Backlinks when determining how related notes are collected from the party pin’s findings.
- You can specify which marker layers the party pin should search for pins.

A handbook is now available through the readme.
releases.name: Party pin enhanced

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: The properties in the party pin logic was AND not or.
releases.name: Party pin logic

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
New additions:
- Max travel time presets
- Panning with right mouse button
- Show filename on hover, can be activated in preferences
- Delete default view in context menu
- Removed image: (newly created maps only have imageBases:)
- Party pins can now scale like sticker, works only for new created pins.
releases.name: Small additions

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
Polyline Drawing & Route Conversion
- Added a polyline drawing mode for creating routes with precision.
- Introduced a “convert route to polyline” function, allowing routes to be saved and reused more reliably.

Measure Pro: Terrain Selection per Waypoint
- This feature can be enabled under Preferences.

Icon Visibility Controls
- Added a checkbox to show or hide SVG and image icons in the collection modal.

Sorting for Icon Lists
- Icon lists now include a sort button, making it easier to organize and find the icons you need.

Party Pins: Dynamic Note Discovery Based on Proximity
This release introduces Party Pins, a powerful new system for context‑aware note linking and discovery.
- When creating a Party Pin, a note is automatically generated and linked to that pin.
- You can configure distance range, tags, and properties that Party Pins should react to.
- When a Party Pin detects another pin within range that matches either the selected tag or property:
  - The linked note is read.
  - All tags from that note are collected into a dynamic table.
  - If your vault contains notes with any of those tags, links to those notes are automatically added to the table.

This enables powerful workflows such as:
- Searching for all pins with the tag shop.
- Party Pins gather all tags from nearby shop‑related notes.
- Those tags can then reveal related notes — for example, the seller — even if the seller is not represented as a pin on the map.

Party Pins act as intelligent connectors between spatial data and your vault’s knowledge graph, reducing the need for redundant pins and making map‑based exploration far more dynamic.
releases.name: Enhanced Mapping

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
📝 Changelog
Added:
- Travel Packs now allow exporting and importing travel unit packs, including the ability to check or uncheck individual unit packs.
- Calibrate now stores every calibrated unit for future reference.
- Added a Preview for Image Icons option under Preferences.
- Swap Pins can now store links to notes individually (use Alt + Right‑Click on a swap pin).

Improved:
- The icon dropdown in the Marker Editor is now sorted alphabetically.
- Add buttons for SVG icons and image icons are now placed at the top of their respective lists. Newly added icons also appear at the top instead of below the button.
- The Collections modal is now wider for improved usability.
- Added an Update viewport button to the Edit view modal. Adjusting the viewport under the frame no longer requires reopening the modal; simply press the button after making changes.

Bug fix:
- SVG icon outline now works properly
releases.name: Pack & Preview: A More Organized Journey

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
Added SVG map support.
- SVG maps now use rasterization when scaled
- Added export options for SVG maps: 2k, 4k, 8k, and 12k WebP

Added measured distance to the context menu.
releases.name: SVG map support

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: You can now set up a travel time per day.
releases.name: Travel time per day

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
Added image caches into Settings→Preferences:
- To load up images faster between note switching you can set up a image cache. (Enable session image cache)
- Note that this image cache only applies to canvas mode. For that you can choose the option Hybrid render, it caches the pictures in canvas and the markers in DOM
- You can choose if you also want overlays to be stored in the cache.

Fixes for callouts:
- YAML now updates correctly on callouts, nested or not. No more duplicate default view.
- The default view now also works on collapsed callouts.

Fixes on image decoding:
- To overall speed improvement the preload image decoding is removed. It was more like a bug that loaded every image twice.
releases.name: Image cache and fixes for callouts and image decoding

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
FIxes for the review bot
And changes for the HUD. The display time for zoom is reduced to 1 second. The HUD stay's now over the frame instead of it lies under.
releases.name: Fixes and changes

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: Issue: Swapping back and forth between two tabs moves the map center.
releases.name: Callout fix

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
FIxed:
- You can now add a new map into a callout without problems.
releases.name: Fixes

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: Updated Frame behavior
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
2 new features added.
- Travel time
  -You can now set up travel times for the distance measure tool
- Frame
  - A picture with transparency can now be used as frame
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
New feature: Text layers.
- Now you can add text layers and draw lines in them to write text.
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
New pins:
- Added swap pins to collections.
  - You can now set up pins that swap their image and link on right click. The context menu opens on alt-rightclick.
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
New features:
- Outline for SVG images
- Tooltip always on checkbox in Marker editor
- ID for YAML
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
Added new features:
- Added command Insert new map... that at this time only works in a note without a Zoom Map YAML inside. It opens a window to set up your map without touching YAML.
- Added Edit view and Set default view here to the context menu. Edit view just opens the YAML configuration and Set default view here set's the view when you load this note to this place and this zoom.
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: Bug fix: On macOS, the context menu for editing markers did not open. On all systems, the context menu triggered in the main UI instead of the separate window where you clicked.
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
QOL: A new preference in the settings to place all newly created pins on the first active marker layer. And you can now delete base and overlay layers from context menu.
Changes for the review bot.
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
Drawing added: You can now draw shapes stored as SVG files in the ZoomMap folder and referenced in marker.json for your maps.
Rotation: Both SVG icons and image icons can now be rotated.
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: Settings enhanced and the field Options added to context menu.
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
SVG's are now cached due to massive lags.
New recolor in Marker Editor.
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
- Per‑map pin sizes: New context menu, per‑icon size overrides stored in markers.json.
- Marker zoom range UX: Zoom range in %, YAML accepts factor/percent strings, normalization & boundary checks.
- Font Awesome integration: Configurable FA folder, improved picker, instant SVG preview, recolor via color picker, create icons with size & anchor.
- HUD pins: Context menu to add viewport‑bound pins, proper scaling, drag classification fix, separated from normal pins.
- Pin/sticker drag fix: Correct offset calculation in world coordinates, pins stay under cursor on zoomable maps.
- Custom/fantasy units: Settings for custom units, selectable in measure menu, HUD & calibration dialog support, stored internally in meters.
- Robustness & code quality: Numerous bugfixes, FA preview stability, performance improvements, new ESLint config with Obsidian rules, lint‑clean codebase.
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
New features added:
- Auto populate in Marker Editor
- Current zoom level is displayed for 5 seconds

Fixed context menu, so it closes by clicks on some entries and stays open by others.
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: Added more features.
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description:
## New!!
- Add new base or overlay layers from context menu.
- Bind marker layers to base layers. They will turn off/on when switching base layers.
- Responsive behavior. Set responsive: true in YAML and the picture is displayed resposive. Width it 100%.
ResizeHandle and other YAML elements like width and height are disabled.
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: New features have been added! You can now add Base and Overlay Layers via the context menu. Additionally, Marker Layers can be managed through the context menu: they can be renamed and deleted. When deleting a layer, its markers can be moved into another layer.
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: Did made some changes requested by the ReviewBot.
releases.name: Zoom Map

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: A new inline save function to store map data in the note. Choose between json and inline. Inline is more save when more than 1 people work on a synced vault at a time.
releases.name: New inline save function

releases.author: Jareika
releases.description: Added features like map stickers, better context menu and a lock function to marker layers.
releases.name: Zoom Map
